brompton_specialists.description: Shops that specifically sell and/or service Brompton folding bikes (authorized dealers, Brompton Junction, or Brompton-focused stores)

shops.name: Brompton Junction Tokyo (Brompton Tokyo)
shops.name_jp: ブロンプトン ジャンクション 東京
shops.hours: Mon, Wed, Fri: 12:00-20:00; Sat, Sun & Holidays: 11:00-19:00; Closed Tue & Thu
shops.sells: Brompton bikes (full range), accessories, parts, service
shops.notes: Official Brompton flagship store opened March 2025 in Jingumae. Test rides available. Near Harajuku/Omotesando area.

shops.name: LIFE with BICYCLE Daikanyama (formerly Brompton Junction Tokyo)
shops.name_jp: LIFE with BICYCLE 代官山
shops.address_jp: 〒150-0021 東京都渋谷区恵比寿西1-31-12 FLEG代官山1F
shops.type: Brompton specialty store (former official Brompton Junction)
shops.sells: Brompton bikes, accessories, parts, service
shops.notes: Renamed from Brompton Junction Tokyo in Oct 2022. Near JR Ebisu Station (Yamanote line). Still a major Brompton dealer.

shops.name: Brompton Junction Kobe (operated by LORO)
shops.name_jp: ブロンプトン ジャンクション 神戸
shops.address_jp: 〒650-0011 兵庫県神戸市中央区下山手通3-3-1
shops.sells: Brompton bikes (full range), accessories, parts, full service
shops.notes: World's first Brompton Junction store. Operated by LORO HPV Group. Full Brompton specialist with maintenance services.

shops.name: LORO Cycleworks Tokyo
shops.name_jp: ローロ サイクルワークス 東京
shops.address_jp: 〒103-0005 東京都中央区日本橋久松町11-6 日本橋TSビル1F
shops.type: Folding bike specialist / Brompton authorized dealer
shops.sells: Brompton, Birdy, Tyrell, CarryMe, recumbents, parts, accessories
shops.notes: Part of LORO HPV Group (10+ stores nationwide). Also a TREK concept store. Tax-free shopping available. 3 min walk from Bakuro-Yokoyama station.

shops.name: LORO Slow Spot (Nihonbashi Muromachi)
shops.name_jp: ローロ スロースポット
shops.address_jp: 〒103-0022 東京都中央区日本橋室町1-9-9
shops.type: Folding bike & recumbent specialist / Brompton dealer
shops.sells: Brompton, Birdy, folding bikes, recumbents
shops.notes: Near Nihonbashi Station (Tozai, Ginza, Toei Asakusa lines). Part of LORO HPV Group.

shops.name: LORO Setagaya
shops.name_jp: ローロ 世田谷
shops.address_jp: 東京都世田谷区上用賀3-7-8
shops.sells: Brompton, Birdy, other folding bikes, parts
shops.notes: Part of LORO HPV Group. Residential area of Tokyo.

shops.name: LORO Cycleworks Yokohama
shops.name_jp: ローロ サイクルワークス 横浜
shops.address_jp: 〒231-0015 神奈川県横浜市中区尾上町5-77 吉住ビル1F
shops.type: Folding bike specialist / Brompton authorized dealer
shops.sells: Brompton, Birdy, Tyrell, CarryMe, parts, accessories
shops.notes: Part of LORO HPV Group. Listed on official Brompton Japan store locator.

shops.name: Green Cycle Station (GCS)
shops.name_jp: グリーンサイクルステーション
shops.address: Yamashita-cho 24-8, City Court Yamashita Park 1F, Naka-ku, Yokohama
shops.address_jp: 〒231-0023 横浜市中区山下町24-8 シティーコート山下公園1F
shops.hours: Mon, Thu-Sat: 11:00-20:00; Sun: 11:00-19:00; Closed Tue & Wed
shops.type: Folding bike & mini-velo specialist / Brompton authorized dealer
shops.sells: Brompton (all models, test rides), mini-velo, folding bikes, parts, accessories
shops.notes: Excellent Brompton specialist with multiple demo bikes for test rides. Featured on Brompton Japan dealer page. Known as a charismatic bike shop in Yokohama. Near Yamashita Park and Chinatown.

shops.name: LORO Cycleworks Kyoto
shops.name_jp: ローロ サイクルワークス 京都
shops.address_jp: 〒603-8142 京都府京都市北区小山北玄以町14-6
shops.type: Folding bike specialist / Brompton authorized dealer
shops.sells: Brompton, Birdy, other folding bikes, parts, accessories
shops.notes: Part of LORO HPV Group. Near Kitayama area. The main Brompton dealer option in Kyoto.

shops.name: LORO Cycleworks Osaka
shops.name_jp: ローロ サイクルワークス 大阪
shops.address_jp: 大阪府大阪市中央区東高麗橋4-7
shops.type: Folding bike specialist / Brompton authorized dealer
shops.sells: Brompton, Birdy, Tyrell, folding bikes, parts
shops.notes: Part of LORO HPV Group. Tax-free shopping available for tourists.

shops.name: LORO Cycleworks Fukuoka
shops.name_jp: ローロ サイクルワークス 福岡
shops.address_jp: 〒810-0074 福岡県福岡市中央区大手門1-2-1 花房ビル1F
shops.type: Folding bike specialist / Brompton authorized dealer
shops.sells: Brompton, Birdy, folding bikes, parts, accessories
shops.notes: Part of LORO HPV Group. Located near Fukuoka Castle grounds entrance in Otemon.

shops.name: LORO Cycleworks Onomichi
shops.name_jp: ローロ サイクルワークス 尾道
shops.address_jp: 〒722-0036 広島県尾道市土堂1-2-12 尾道本通り商店街内
shops.type: Folding bike specialist / Brompton dealer + rental
shops.sells: Brompton, Birdy, folding bikes, rentals, parts
shops.notes: Located in Onomichi Shopping Street. Also offers bike rentals. Great for Shimanami Kaido cycling route. Part of LORO HPV Group.

shops.name: LORO Cycleworks Matsuyama
shops.name_jp: ローロ サイクルワークス 松山
shops.address_jp: 〒790-0003 愛媛県松山市三番町4丁目4-9 NAIKAIビル1F
shops.sells: Brompton, Birdy, folding bikes, parts
shops.notes: Part of LORO HPV Group. Good for cyclists doing Shimanami Kaido from the Shikoku side.

general_bike_shops.description: General bike shops useful for cyclists - may have parts, tools, service, and some carry Brompton or Brompton accessories

shops.name: Blue Lug Hatagaya
shops.name_jp: ブルーラグ 幡ヶ谷店
shops.type: General bike shop / Brompton accessories & parts
shops.sells: Bikes, Brompton accessories (bags, stands, parts by Nitto/Fairweather), components, clothing, bags
shops.notes: Iconic Tokyo bike shop. Carries Brompton-specific accessories and custom parts. English-friendly staff. Great for unique Brompton bags and Nitto Brompton maintenance stands. Near Hatagaya Station (Keio line). Open late.

shops.name: Blue Lug Yoyogi Park
shops.name_jp: ブルーラグ 代々木公園店
shops.hours: Mon, Wed, Fri-Sun: 12:00-19:00; Closed Tue & Thu
shops.sells: Bikes, Brompton accessories, components, bags, clothing
shops.notes: Most accessible Blue Lug for foreign visitors. 10 minutes from Shibuya station. Carries Brompton accessories. English-friendly. Essential visit for any cyclist in Tokyo.

shops.name: Blue Lug Kamiuma
shops.name_jp: ブルーラグ 上馬店
shops.sells: Bikes, components, accessories, bags
shops.notes: Third Blue Lug location. Same great selection. Residential area.

shops.name: Y's Road Shinjuku Honkan
shops.name_jp: ワイズロード 新宿本館
shops.address: 2-19-1 Shinjuku, Shinjuku-ku, Tokyo (BYGS Shinjuku Building B1F)
shops.address_jp: 〒160-0022 東京都新宿区新宿2-19-1 ビッグス新宿ビルB1F
shops.hours: Mon, Thu-Fri: 12:00-20:00; Sat-Sun & Holidays: 11:00-19:00; Closed Tue & Wed
shops.type: Large sports bike shop (34 stores nationwide)
shops.sells: Road bikes, MTB, triathlon bikes, parts, accessories, clothing
shops.notes: Japan's largest sports bike chain with 34 stores. Some staff speak English/Chinese. Exit C8 from Shinjuku 3-chome station. NOT a Brompton dealer but excellent for general bike parts, tools, and service. Tax-free shopping available.

shops.name: Y's Road Shimbashi
shops.name_jp: ワイズロード 新橋店
shops.address: 4-11-1 Shimbashi, Minato-ku, Tokyo (A-PLACE Shimbashi Building B1F & 1F)
shops.address_jp: 〒105-0004 東京都港区新橋4-11-1 A-PLACE新橋ビル B1F・1F
shops.sells: Road bikes, parts, accessories, tools
shops.notes: 3 minutes from JR Shimbashi Station (Karasumori Exit). About 10 min from Tokyo Station. English blog posts available.

shops.name: Y's Road Ochanomizu
shops.name_jp: ワイズロード お茶の水店
shops.address_jp: 東京都千代田区神田小川町1-6-1 1F
shops.sells: Road bikes, parts, accessories, tools
shops.notes: In the traditional Ochanomizu sports/outdoor shopping district.

shops.name: Y's Road Osaka
shops.name_jp: ワイズロード 大阪店
shops.address_jp: 〒541-0058 大阪府大阪市中央区南久宝寺町2-2-9 船場藤井ビル1F
shops.sells: Road bikes, parts, accessories, tools
shops.notes: Main Y's Road location in Osaka. Good for general cycling parts and accessories.

shops.name: Nalsima Frend (Nalsima Friend)
shops.name_jp: なるしまフレンド 神宮店
shops.address_jp: 〒151-0051 東京都渋谷区千駄ヶ谷2-2-4
shops.sells: Road bikes, triathlon bikes, high-end frames, parts, accessories
shops.notes: Has English-speaking staff. Well-known road bike shop near Jingu Gaien. Top-end frames and excellent service. 3 min walk from Kita-Sando Station. NOT Brompton specific but great for general bike service.

shops.name: Bonsai Cycle Works
shops.name_jp: 盆栽自転車店
shops.address_jp: 〒151-0051 東京都渋谷区千駄ヶ谷4-11-8
shops.sells: Custom builds (Indy Fab, Vynl, Cielo), high-end frames, coffee & cakes
shops.notes: Small curated shop with cafe. Run by husband and wife team. Known internationally via blog/Instagram. Near Meiji Shrine. Custom builds focus. Not Brompton-specific but a must-visit for cycling culture.

shops.name: Circles
shops.name_jp: サークルズ
shops.address_jp: 〒460-0012 愛知県名古屋市中区千代田4-14-20
shops.type: World-class bike shop / cycling culture destination
shops.sells: Bikes, frames, components, accessories, SimWorks products
shops.notes: International cycling destination. Staff understand some English. Parking lot available. Home of SimWorks. Not Brompton-specific but excellent for general parts, accessories, and cycling culture.

shops.name: Giant Store Onomichi
shops.name_jp: ジャイアントストア 尾道
shops.address_jp: 広島県尾道市西御所町5-11 ONOMICHI U2内
shops.sells: Giant bikes, rentals, parts, accessories
shops.notes: Operated by professional cyclists. In the Onomichi U2 warehouse complex. Great for Shimanami Kaido rentals and gear. Not Brompton-specific.

shops.name: Giant Store Imabari
shops.name_jp: ジャイアントストア 今治
shops.address_jp: 愛媛県今治市北宝来町 今治駅1F
shops.sells: Giant bikes, rentals, parts, accessories
shops.notes: On ground floor of JR Imabari Station. Perfect starting point for Shimanami Kaido. Not Brompton-specific.

online_resources.name: Carbon Dry Japan (CDJ)
online_resources.description: Online shop specializing in carbon Brompton parts (handlebars, chain tensioners, frame protectors). No physical retail store but ships within Japan.

online_resources.name: Blue Lug Global Online Store
online_resources.description: Online store with Brompton-specific accessories: bags, Nitto maintenance stands, Fairweather bags, Cane Creek eebrake for Brompton.

online_resources.name: LORO Online Store
online_resources.description: Online store for LORO HPV Group with folding bike parts and accessories.

online_resources.name: iruka Authorized Online Store by LORO
online_resources.description: Online store operated by LORO for iruka and other folding bike brands.

key_notes: LORO HPV Group is the dominant Brompton dealer network in Japan with 10+ stores across the country
Brompton Junction Tokyo (Jingumae) is the official flagship store opened 2025
Brompton Junction Kobe was the world's first Brompton Junction (2011), operated by LORO
LIFE with BICYCLE Daikanyama is the former Brompton Junction Tokyo (renamed Oct 2022)
Blue Lug is NOT an authorized Brompton dealer but carries excellent Brompton accessories and custom parts
Y's Road has 34 stores nationwide and is best for general bike parts/tools/service
Green Cycle Station in Yokohama is an excellent Brompton specialist with test rides
Tax-free shopping is available at LORO stores and some Y's Road locations for tourists
For Shimanami Kaido cycling: LORO Onomichi and LORO Matsuyama cover both ends of the route
